mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( content, user_id, post_id, parent_id ) VALUES ( #{content}, #{userId}, #{postId}, #{parentId} )
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, content, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, like_count, user_id, post_id, parent_id FROM comments WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT comment_id, content, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, like_count, user_id, post_id, parent_id FROM comments WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
